svg.text: How research sources become continuously-revised Beliefs — one Postgres store (pgvector), coordinator-owned writes
discover A2A agents · build skill registry
call scout_* via the A2A wire protocol
adds counter-Claims + a BeliefRevision — never edits a Claim
Scheduled jobs (per field; config in Postgres schedules):
each job is its own checkpointed LangGraph graph;
scheduler reconciles config from Postgres every 30s.
fires skeptic_sweep (discovery / belief_consolidation / consolidation run their own graphs the same way)
Invariants: Claims immutable · BeliefRevisions append-only · agents are pure (no DB)
Knowledge flows one way: scout → ingest → extract → resolve → synthesize. The coordinator is the sole writer; every other path only adds evidence or reads.
All state is partitioned by Field (default: ai-robotics); the core never branches on field. Optional tiered model routing escalates hard requests to a stronger model.
